sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16389" key="a)spidopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσπῐδο-ποιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n16389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shield-maker,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:155" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.155</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
